/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libcgame.so -o libcgame.so CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_main.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_draw.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_weapons.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_players.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_playerstate.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_predict.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_ents.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_effects.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_localents.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_marks.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_particles.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_view.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_servercmds.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_info.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_consolecmds.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_drawtools.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_event.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_flamethrower.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_newDraw.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_scoreboard.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_snapshot.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_sound.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_syscalls.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/cgame/cg_trails.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/game/bg_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/game/bg_pmove.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/game/bg_slidemove.c.o CMakeFiles/cgame.dir/src/game/q_math.c.o
